mapper.sql: id, apply_id, title, file_name, file_hash, file_size, timestamp_value, cert_number, apply_status, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_time, issue_time, remark, c_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM data_timestamp WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT FROM data_timestamp WHERE apply_id = #{applyId} AND is_del = 0
